brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Silver zone transformation of BLS OEWS wage-percentile data. Reads 831 rows from bronze.bls_oews, validates SOC code format (XX-XXXX) — rows with malformed codes are logged and skipped per spec §Silver Transformations §1, normalizes top-coded percentile values to exactly $239,200 when wage_capped=True (floating-point drift guard, only applied to capped rows), enforces monotonicity (p10<=p25<=median<=p75<=p90 across non-null values) by LOGGING violations without skipping rows so the Silver DQ rule SLV-OEWS-005 catches anything upstream missed, computes deterministic record_id via compute_grain_id(record, ['soc_code'], prefix='oews'), drops Bronze-only metadata fields (source_url, source_method, wage_hourly_median), and promotes to base.bls_oews via the idempotent promote pattern. 0 rows skipped due to malformed SOC codes (Bronze had 100% format compliance per RAW-OEWS-002). 45 capped rows preserved verbatim (wage_capped=True maps to top-coded $239,200 per BLS publishing convention).

documentation.description: Transform raw BLS OEWS wage-percentile data from Bronze into clean, validated Silver base table. Validates SOC code format, normalizes top-coded values to exactly $239,200 on capped rows, enforces wage-percentile monotonicity (logging violations without skipping rows), computes deterministic record_id via grain hash on soc_code with 'oews' prefix, drops raw metadata fields (source_url, source_method, wage_hourly_median), and promotes via idempotent append with dedup on record_id. 13-column Silver schema.

record_id.transformationDescription: Deterministic grain hash via compute_grain_id(record, ['soc_code'], prefix='oews'). SHA-256 of the validated soc_code with the 'oews' prefix.

soc_code.transformationDescription: Stripped whitespace, then validated against XX-XXXX regex pattern. ValueError raised on format violation; the multi-row transform logs and skips such rows per spec §Silver Transformations §1.

occupation_title.transformationDescription: Stripped whitespace; required (raises ValueError if null/empty).

total_employment.transformationDescription: Direct carry from Bronze. Already converted to integer count during Bronze ingestion.

wage_annual_p10.transformationDescription: Direct carry from Bronze. Validated for monotonicity (p10 <= p25) where both non-null. If wage_capped=True and the Bronze value is within $1 of $239,200, snapped to exactly 239200.0 (floating-point drift guard).

wage_annual_p25.transformationDescription: Direct carry from Bronze. Validated for monotonicity (p25 <= median) where both non-null. Top-code drift guard same as p10.

wage_annual_median.transformationDescription: Direct carry from Bronze. Validated for monotonicity (p25 <= median <= p75) where non-null. Top-code drift guard same as p10.

wage_annual_p75.transformationDescription: Direct carry from Bronze. Validated for monotonicity (median <= p75) where both non-null. Top-code drift guard same as p10.

wage_annual_p90.transformationDescription: Direct carry from Bronze. Validated for monotonicity (p75 <= p90) where both non-null. Top-code drift guard same as p10.

wage_annual_mean.transformationDescription: Direct carry from Bronze. Published uncapped by BLS even when percentiles are capped (mean > p90 is expected on top-coded rows by design).

wage_capped.transformationDescription: Direct carry from Bronze; coerced to bool, defaults to False if missing. Required field. Used to drive top-code value normalization on capped rows.

source_load_date.transformationDescription: Column rename from 'load_date' to 'source_load_date'. Preserves the Bronze ingest date. No value transformation.

ingested_at.transformationDescription: UTC timestamp generated at Silver promotion time via datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.timezone.utc). Independent of Bronze ingested_at.

wage_hourly_median.reason: Hourly wage equivalent kept in Bronze for reference but not consumed downstream. Spec §Silver Schema lists 13 fields; hourly wages are out of scope for the FutureProof CareerCard salary range.

source_url.reason: Raw metadata field not needed in Silver zone.

source_method.reason: Raw metadata field not needed in Silver zone.
